lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order and has been meticulously maintained.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The engine struggles to idle and emits a noticeable knocking sound, while the transmission slips frequently between gears. The exterior shows substantial rust and paint failure, and the interior has several tears in the upholstery. It is being sold as-is for parts or a major restoration project.

This is a fantastic opportunity to get behind the wheel of a dependable vehicle that offers great value! While it shows some typical wear and tear from its adventures on the road, it remains a solid and functional choice for your daily commute. It’s an honest, hard-working car ready for its next owner!

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several scratches and minor dents. The interior shows moderate wear and some staining. Mechanically, the car runs but will likely need repairs or maintenance soon.

This vehicle is in fair condition and is best suited for someone looking for a functional commuter car that doesn't need to be perfect. Mechanically, it starts and runs reliably, though the suspension is starting to feel a bit soft and there is a slow oil seep from the valve cover gasket that will eventually need attention. Inside, the driver's seat shows significant bolster wear and the infotainment screen has a few dead pixels. The exterior has its share of character, including several stone chips on the front bumper and a small dent on the rear passenger door. It’s a solid, honest car that gets the job done but definitely shows its age and mileage.

Presented here is an automotive specimen of the highest order, maintained in impeccable, showroom-state condition. This vehicle exhibits zero aesthetic or mechanical deficiencies, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Every surface, from the flawless paintwork to the pristine upholstery, remains in an untouched state. We invite discerning enthusiasts to acquire this peerless example of engineering excellence.

Hey there! I’m so excited to share this absolute beauty with you. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape it still feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered and kept in flawless condition, inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that looks and drives like a dream, this is the one. Come take a look—you won't be disappointed!
Offering a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in Laguna Seca Blue. This S54-powered icon features a
Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Smoke-free interior. Full service history. Clean title in hand.

This vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of automotive preservation, presenting in a state that rivals its original showroom debut. The exterior finish is breathtaking, showcasing deep, mirror-like paint clarity that has been protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating; there are no rock chips, swirl marks, or blemishes to be found anywhere on the body. Every panel gap is factory-perfect, and the alloy wheels are entirely free of curb rash, wrapped in premium tires with near-full tread. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule. The leather upholstery remains supple and matte, devoid of the typical sheen or bolster wear found in used examples, and the interior still retains that distinct new-car aroma. All technological features, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance suites, operate with precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, backed by a comprehensive, single-owner service history documented exclusively through authorized dealerships. It has been strictly garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and has never seen inclement weather. This is a rare opportunity to own a museum-quality example for the most discerning collector.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory freshness. Meticulously preserved and maintained to the highest standards, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from a new arrival. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of investment-grade quality.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine specimen.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly mint condition—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken meticulous care of it, keeping it spotless inside and out. It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next big adventure. You really won't find one cleaner than this! Feel free to reach out if you want to take a look!

Offering a pristine E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L high-revving inline-six with individual throttle bodies. This specimen exhibits flawless VANOS operation and has received proactive rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity under high-torque loads. The 6-speed Getrag manual transmission offers precise gates, paired with a limited-slip differential that remains tight and responsive. Every bushing, link, and damper maintains factory-spec tolerances, delivering the iconic chassis balance and telepathic steering feedback these cars are renowned for. A true collector-grade vehicle with zero mechanical deferred maintenance and an immaculate undercarriage.
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Original paint. Interior is flawless. Full service history included.

Presented in breathtaking, showroom-quality condition, this vehicle is a rare find for the discerning collector or enthusiast. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, maintaining a deep, glass-like luster without a single rock chip, swirl mark, or blemish, having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled environment. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and matte, showing zero signs of wear or bolster compression, and the interior still retains its original new-car fragrance. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, supported by a meticulous service history with all maintenance performed strictly at authorized dealerships. This is a single-owner, low-mileage example that drives as smoothly and powerfully as the day it was manufactured. It represents the pinnacle of its model line, offering a 'better-than-new' experience for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in flawless showroom condition. This unit represents a premier opportunity to acquire a specimen of uncompromising mechanical and aesthetic integrity. Every detail has been rigorously vetted to ensure it meets our exacting standards for excellence. This is, without reservation, the most distinguished example currently available to the discerning collector.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, collector-grade condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. Engineered for the discerning enthusiast, it represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that retains its original showroom luster and mechanical integrity. We invite serious inquiries to experience a standard of automotive preservation that defines the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You've gotta see this gorgeous ride! It's in absolutely stunning condition—honestly, it's like-new and has been pampered since day one. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. I'm so sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it! Come grab this gem while it lasts!

This collector-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance. The S54 inline-six operates with surgical precision, benefiting from a documented VANOS overhaul and proactive rod bearing service. Power is delivered through a crisp six-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The chassis remains structurally flawless with a reinforced rear subframe and factory-spec suspension bushings for uncompromising lateral grip. Every component, from the individual throttle bodies to the pristine undercarriage, reflects a rigorous maintenance regimen. Finished in original paint with an interior that retains its factory-fresh matte textures, this is a turn-key example for the discerning enthusiast.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Maintenance records available.

Presenting an automotive masterpiece in true showroom condition. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, retaining its original high-gloss factory finish with a professional ceramic coating for added depth and protection. There are absolutely no paint chips, door dings, or imperfections to be found. Inside, the cabin remains indistinguishable from new, featuring supple, unscuffed premium leather that still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is peerless; it has been serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships with a complete, documented history of preventative maintenance. It sits on pristine alloy wheels wrapped in high-performance tires with near-full tread. Included are all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a custom-fit indoor car cover. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that has been treated with the utmost reverence.

We are proud to present an exceptional example of automotive excellence, preserved in verified showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits an uncompromising level of care, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Rigorously inspected to ensure it meets the highest standards of mechanical and aesthetic integrity, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presented in superlative condition, this vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence. Meticulously preserved and maintained to the highest standards, it offers a showroom-quality aesthetic and uncompromising performance. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a truly pristine, investment-grade specimen.

Hey there! You've got to see this absolute beauty! It’s been pampered since day one and honestly looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. Not a scratch or a blemish in sight—it’s just pure perfection inside and out. It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next lucky owner. You won't find another one in this incredible shape, so come grab it while you can!

Offered is a meticulously preserved specimen featuring the legendary S54 B32 naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. This unit boasts a reinforced rear subframe and a recently overhauled double-VANOS system, ensuring peak volumetric efficiency. The ZF 6-speed manual transmission shifts with tactile precision, paired with a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Suspension geometry remains true to factory tolerances, augmented by fresh bushings and Bilstein dampers. With a flawless underbody and zero oxidation, this vehicle represents a turnkey opportunity for the discerning collector seeking mechanical perfection and uncompromising performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service records. No accidents.

This vehicle is presented in museum-grade condition, representing a rare find for the discerning collector. The exterior boasts a flawless, mirror-like finish with no chips, swirls, or imperfections, further preserved by a high-end ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather remains supple with zero bolster wear, and the interior still retains its original factory scent. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been garage-kept under a climate-controlled cover and never driven in inclement weather. A complete, chronological service history is included, documenting every preventative maintenance milestone performed by certified technicians. This is a truly pristine, turnkey example of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that rivals its original showroom state. This unit exemplifies automotive excellence, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior cabin that remains entirely free of wear. Meticulously preserved and strictly serviced, it offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly superlative condition.
